response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a Hololive production featuring two vocal songs. 2. Performed web searches for 'Prism Melody' lyrics and 'Show Them (Who You Are)' lyrics, as identified by their appearance in the video. 3. Used the composer information (5u5h1 for 'Prism Melody', Eka Gustiwana & Prince Husein for 'Show Them (Who You Are)') to confirm the official songs. 4. Mapped the songs to specific time segments. 5. Compiled the lyrics and structured the JSON.
response.global_summary: This video features a performance of two songs by Hololive production members, presented as part of a countdown live event ('#holocountdown2025'). The first song is 'Prism Melody', followed by 'Show Them (Who You Are)'.

scenes.description: The video begins with a performance of 'Prism Melody' by various Hololive members on a stage decorated with Coca-Cola branding. The choreography features the group dancing to the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:

途切れないように歌うんだ
もっと高く！大きな声で
聴こえてた？何かが始まるサイン
集まって気付けば和音(コード)を奏でた
夢に見るだけじゃもう足りないでしょ？
キミを待ってる世界があるよ
楽しい予感にほら

走ろう！
連れて行くよ！光の真ん中
夢の先へ
羽ばたける勇気はキミの願い
皆で繋いだこの奇跡が
途切れないように歌うんだ
もっと高く！大きな声で
答えとか理屈に惑わされて
彷徨っても戻ってこれる場所があったんだ
地図にない道ゆく僕らの旅
願いだけが道標だよ
夢の色が変わっても

信じてくれる仲間と一緒に
どこへだって飛び出していこう
もっと遠く！空を越えて

take my hand！！
連れて行くよ！光の真ん中
夢の先へ
羽ばたける勇気はキミの願い

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
So, it's always our miracle
I sing so it won't break
With a louder voice
Did you hear it? The sign that something is starting
We gathered, and when I noticed, we were playing the chords
It's not enough just to dream about it, right?
There's a world waiting for you
Just jump on the fun premonition
Because we can't stop the excitement
Let's run!
I'll take you, to the center of the light, beyond the dream
The courage to fly is your wish
This miracle we connected together
I sing so it won't break
With a louder voice
Confused by answers and logic
Even if we wandered, there was a place to return to
Our journey on a path not on the map
Only our wishes are the guide
Even if the color of the dream changes
The melody remains the same
Let's sing for you, and for us
That's right, surely, our miracle will not end
Let's turn even tears into an opportunity
Together with the friends who believe in us
Let's jump out anywhere
Further, beyond the sky
To our future selves and to the you I haven't met yet
There are many things I want to convey
The present we've reached isn't something to take for granted
Spread your wings, come on, let's fly now
Take my hand, I'll take you
To the center of the light, beyond the dream
The courage to fly is your wish
This miracle we connected together
I sing so it won't break
With a louder voice
Coloring our future
Resound everywhere, Prism Melody!

scenes.description: The song 'Show Them (Who You Are)' begins, performed by Hololive Indonesia members. The stage remains in the same setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Won't you just forget about the past?
Cause in time it will never matter
But the love we had, I'm hoping it will last
Bersama kita t'lah lewati
Tawa dan canda jadi memori
Pastikan artinya kan cerahkan mu nanti
To do what you were meant to do
For it's time to make it true
Together we can always stand
Your hand in my hand
Forever hand in hand
Tuk mulai bermimpi
Genggam lah yang kau cari
Teriakkan, la la la la la, la la la la la
Kau takkan sendiri
It's time to show them who you are
Just shout it from the mountain high
To the sky we go, we go
Bersama kita t'lah lewati
Tawa dan canda jadi memori
Pastikan artinya cerahkan mu nanti
Cerahkan mu nanti
To do what you were meant to do
For it's time to make it true
Together we can always stand
Your hand in my hand
Forever hand in hand
Tuk mulai bermimpi
Genggam lah yang kau cari
Teriakkan, la la la la la, la la la la la
Kau takkan sendiri
So go and travel far
Run and show them who you are
I'll be singing, la la la la la, la la la la la
Be who you meant to be
Jangan kau takut
Karena pada akhirnya
Semua kan baik saja
Arahkan pandangan mu
Tajam lurus ke depan
Tuk mulai bermimpi
Genggam lah yang kau cari
Teriakkan, la la la la la, la la la la la
Kau takkan sendiri
So go and travel far
Run and show them who you are
I'll be singing, la la la la la, la la la la la
Be who you meant to be
It's time to show them who you are
Just shout it from the mountain high
To the sky we go, we go
